card.name: team detailed stats table

stages.native:
WITH current_date_standings AS (
      -- Get the most recent date with standings data
      SELECT MAX(date_key) AS max_date
      FROM dbt_analytics.prod.FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY
  )

  SELECT
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."DIM_TEAMS".team_name AS "Team",
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."DIM_TEAMS".division AS "DIVISION", 
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".league_rank AS "LEAGUE_STANDING",
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".points AS "PTS",
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".games_played AS "GP",
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".record AS "RECORD",
      ROUND("DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".points_percentage, 3) AS "PCT",
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".home_record AS "HOME",
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".away_record AS "ROAD",
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".last_10_record AS "L10",
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".shootout_record AS "SHOOTOUT",
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".goal_diff_string AS "Diff",
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".goals_for AS "GF",
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".goals_against AS "GA",
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".streak_string AS "Streak",
      "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."DIM_TEAMS".logo_url AS "Int Teams Basic Info - Team Abv__LOGO_URL"
  FROM "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"
  INNER JOIN "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."DIM_TEAMS"
      ON "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".team_key = "PROD"."DIM_TEAMS".team_key
  CROSS JOIN current_date_standings cds
  WHERE "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".date_key = cds.max_date
      AND 1=1
      and {{conference}}
  ORDER BY "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".points DESC
  LIMIT 1048575

card.name: Selected Team Division Standings

stages.native:
SELECT
  c."TEAM" AS "TEAM",
  c."TEAM_ABV" AS "TEAM_ABV",
  c."DIVISION" AS "DIVISION",
  c."DIVISION_STANDING" AS "DIVISION_STANDING",
  c."RECORD" AS "RECORD",
  c."GAMES_PLAYED" AS "GAMES_PLAYED",
  c."POINTS" AS "POINTS",
  c."GOAL_DIFF_STRING" as "GD",
  i."LOGO_URL" AS "LOGO_URL"
FROM
  "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."INT__CURRENT_STANDINGS" c left join
  "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."INT__TEAMS_BASIC_INFO" i on i."TEAM_ABV" = c."TEAM_ABV"
WHERE
    c."DIVISION" = (
        select "PROD"."INT__CURRENT_STANDINGS"."DIVISION"
        from "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."INT__CURRENT_STANDINGS"
        where {{TEAM_ABV}}
    )
ORDER BY c."DIVISION_STANDING"

card.name: Standings By Day

stages.native:
with cte as (
select "SEASON_KEY"
, DATE as date
, team_abv
, sum(points) as points
from "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"
join "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."DIM_TEAMS"
	on "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".team_key = "PROD"."DIM_TEAMS".team_key
join "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."DIM_DATES"
	on "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY".date_key = "PROD"."DIM_DATES".date_key
where 1=1
and {{ season }}
and {{ dates }}
and {{ team }}
and {{ conference }}
group by 1,2,3
order by date desc, 4 desc
limit 2000
) 
select *
from cte 
order by date, points desc

card.name: Date Filterable Central Division Table

stages.native:
SELECT
  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."DATE_KEY" AS "DATE",
  "PROD"."DIM_TEAMS"."TEAM_ABV" AS "TEAM_ABV",
  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."GAMES_PLAYED" AS "GP",
  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."POINTS" AS "PTS",
  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."WINS" AS "W",
  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."LOSSES" AS "L",
  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."OT_LOSSES" AS "OTL",
  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."GOALS_AGAINST" AS "GOALS_AGAINST",
  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."GOAL_DIFFERENTIAL" AS "Diff",
  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."LEAGUE_RANK" AS "LEAGUESEQUENCE",
  "PROD"."DIM_TEAMS"."TEAM_NAME" AS "TEAM_NAME",
  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."GOALS_FOR" AS "GOALS_FOR",
  "DIM_TEAMS"."LOGO_URL" AS "Int Teams Basic Info - Team Abv__LOGO_URL"
FROM
  "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"
JOIN DBT_ANALYTICS.PROD.DIM_DATES DD ON  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."DATE_KEY" = DD.DATE_KEY
LEFT JOIN "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."DIM_TEAMS" ON "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."TEAM_KEY" = "DIM_TEAMS"."TEAM_KEY"
WHERE
  "PROD"."DIM_TEAMS"."DIVISION" = 'Central'
  and {{season}}
  and {{dates}}
QUALIFY RANK() OVER(ORDER BY "FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."DATE_KEY" DESC) = 1
ORDER BY
  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."DATE_KEY" DESC,
  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."DIVISION_RANK" ASC

  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."LOSSES" AS "L",

  "PROD"."DIM_TEAMS"."TEAM_NAME" AS "TEAM_NAME",
  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."GOALS_FOR" AS "GOALS_FOR",
  "DIM_TEAMS"."LOGO_URL" AS "Int Teams Basic Info - Team Abv__LOGO_URL"
FROM
  "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"
JOIN DBT_ANALYTICS.PROD.DIM_DATES DD ON  "PROD"."FCT_STANDINGS_DAILY"."DATE_KEY" = DD.DATE_KEY

card.name: Future Games Table

stages.native:
SELECT
  "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."VENUE" AS "Venue",
  "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."AWAY_LOGO" as "al",
  "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."HOME_LOGO" as "hl",
  "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."AWAY_ABV" AS "AWAY_ABV",
  "i"."RECORD" as "Away Record",
  "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."HOME_ABV" AS "HOME_ABV",
  "ii"."RECORD" as "Home Record",
--   "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."GAME_TYPE" AS "GAME_TYPE",
--   "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."NEUTRAL" AS "Neutral Site",
  timeadd(hour, cast(split_part("DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."EASTERN_OFFSET", ':', 1) as int), to_timestamp("DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."START_TIME_UTC")) as "start_time",
  "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."SPECIAL_EVENT" AS "Special Event",
  CASE
    WHEN "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."ID" > 0 THEN '@'
    ELSE '@'
  END AS "connector"
FROM
  "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"
left join "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."INT__CURRENT_STANDINGS" as "i"
on "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."AWAY_ABV" = "i"."TEAM_ABV"
left join "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."INT__CURRENT_STANDINGS" as "ii"
on "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."HOME_ABV" = "ii"."TEAM_ABV"
where
    ("DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."HOME_ABV" = {{team}} or "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."AWAY_ABV" = {{team}})
	and "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."GAME_DATE"::date >= current_date
order by "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."GAME_DATE"
LIMIT
  1048575

card.legacy_query:
{"database":2,"type":"native","native":{"collection":"UPCOMING_GAMES","template-tags":{"team":{"type":"text","name":"team","id":"936cb74a-1c01-4dfa-a7fd-7d1e08dbd0a6","display-name":"Team"}},"query":"SELECT
  "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."VENUE" AS "Venue",
  "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."AWAY_LOGO" as "al",
  "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."HOME_LOGO" as "hl",
  "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."AWAY_ABV" AS "AWAY_ABV",
  "i"."RECORD" as "Away Record",
  "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."HOME_ABV" AS "HOME_ABV",
  "ii"."RECORD" as "Home Record",
--   "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."GAME_DATE" AS "Game Date",
--   "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."GAME_TYPE" AS "GAME_TYPE",
--   "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."NEUTRAL" AS "Neutral Site",
  timeadd(hour, cast(split_part("PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."EASTERN_OFFSET", ':', 1) as int), to_timestamp("PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."START_TIME_UTC")) as "start_time",
  "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."SPECIAL_EVENT" AS "Special Event",
  CASE
    WHEN "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."ID" > 0 THEN '@'
    ELSE '@'
  END AS "connector"
FROM
  "DBT_ANALYTICS"."PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"
left join "PROD"."INT__CURRENT_STANDINGS" as "i"
on "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."AWAY_ABV" = "i"."TEAM_ABV"
left join "PROD"."INT__CURRENT_STANDINGS" as "ii"
on "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."HOME_ABV" = "ii"."TEAM_ABV"
where
    "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."HOME_ABV" = {{team}} or "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."AWAY_ABV" = {{team}}
	and "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."GAME_DATE" >= current_date
order by "PROD"."UPCOMING_GAMES"."GAME_DATE"
LIMIT
  1048575"}}
